title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Atos India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Atos India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Atos India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Atos India:
Atos India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Atos India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
